message: refactor: remove core provider model definitions compat

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,13 @@

+export {
+  buildMinimaxApiModelDefinition,
+  buildMinimaxModelDefinition,
+  DEFAULT_MINIMAX_BASE_URL,

+} from "./model-definitions.js";
